## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Scope

- [ ] Affects the public npm package `@knowledge-alchemy/ddd-spec`
- [ ] Affects maintainer-only repository workflows or private workspace code
- [ ] Requires updates to `skills/ddd-spec/` because public package behavior or AI guidance changed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run release:dry-run`
- [ ] Additional targeted checks documented below when needed

## Release Surface

- [ ] No public package metadata, docs, or release-path impact
- [ ] Public package docs or metadata changed
- [ ] Public package runtime or CLI surface changed
- [ ] Changeset added when a publishable package change is intended

## Notes

List follow-ups, tradeoffs, or reviewer context.
